author: lucanise-pro
description: Chat with Claude about your notes. Works on iOS and iPadOS. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Lucanise
manifest.description: Chat with Claude about your notes. Claude reads and edits your vault on demand. Works on iOS and iPadOS.
manifest.name: Lucanise Vault Assistant

name: Lucanise Vault Assistant

releases.author: lucanise-pro
releases.description:
## What's new in 1.2.0

### ✏️ Edit reliability — no more weird signs
Note edits now write exactly what Claude generates. The content goes directly from the API to the vault with zero JSON serialisation — the previous approach mangled markdown characters like `**`, backticks, and backslashes.

### 📋 Cowork-style edit proposal card
Edits appear as a structured card with a content preview before you commit:
- Filename + one-line summary from Claude
- Tap the preview to expand and read the proposed content
- Apply / Discard buttons for edit, create, rename, delete

### 🗂 Smart note cache with auto-invalidation
- Invalidated immediately when a file is modified in Obsidian
- 10-minute TTL safety net
- Max 50 entries with LRU eviction
- Manual clear in Settings → Clear Note Cache

### ⚡ Token efficiency
- Prompt caching (~80% cost reduction on system prompt from turn 2 onwards)
- Conversation sliding window — keeps first turn + last 6, drops middle
- File index sent only on first conversation turn
- Max tokens raised to 8192 default, slider extended to 16384

### 🐛 Bug fixes
- Root folder scope now correctly shows "Vault root · N notes"
- Write tools (edit, create) now always trigger the Apply button
- Note scope no longer blocks explicit file reads via tools
- `.md` extension auto-added when missing from create/rename paths
releases.name: 1.2.0 — Reliable edits, Cowork UI, token efficiency

releases.author: lucanise-pro
releases.description:
## What's fixed in 1.1.1

- **Create & edit notes now work reliably** — Claude uses dedicated write tools (`edit_note`, `create_note`, `rename_note`, `delete_note`) instead of a fragile text format
- **Apply button always appears** when Claude proposes a change
- **Max tokens raised to 4096** — previous default of 2048 was too low for full note rewrites
- **Note scope no longer blocks reads** — in Note scope Claude can still read other files if you explicitly ask
- **Loading status for write operations** — shows "Preparing edit: filename.md…" while Claude works
- **Auto `.md` extension** — paths without extension are fixed automatically
- **Token limit warning** — if response is cut short, a message tells you to increase Max Tokens in settings
releases.name: 1.1.1 — Write tools & stability fixes
